blended.narrative: Le Massif is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.4 inches of dry powder expected. Snow levels around 134 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
